post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 169 (Newbie Game 69) - What Even Am I Doing Mafia

Story
[story coming soon]


Credit to willwang and Binomial and all the other people who created the rules template, and credit to e for a lot of the role PM’s and credit to apw for giving credit to e. no credit to apw for not giving credit to summit and credit to summit. or something.

Please read all the rules, especially if this is your first game.
Do not post if you are not in this game. No minecraft comments plsssss

Rules
  • Read the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me(or the comod) at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
  • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me or the comod, including role PMs. Do not play around with exploiting this rule.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderator or the comod, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
  • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • Do not edit the tags on the thread. This also applies if you are not playing the game.


Voting/Hangingses
  • This game is based on deadline hang. The player with the most votes at the time the deadline is reached is hanged. In the case of a tie, the hang is randomly decided among the players with the most votes. Starting Day 2, majority hang is enabled, which means day will end early if at any time a player has more than half the amount of total votes on them. If majority hang is not reached, deadline hang occurs.
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: fdsa", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid. There is one exception to this; see below rule.
  • The characters "I" (capital i) and "l" (lowercase L) are considered the same character for the purpose of voting. That is, attempting to fakevote by substituting one of these characters in will not work.
  • You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • At a LyLo (hang or lose) situation, which is three town and two mafia, or two town and one mafia currently alive, votes are locked. This means that any attempt to unvote will be ignored, regardless of what the vote is.


Activity
  • Each day will be 336 hours (2 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 336 hours has occurred.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • If a player does not post in a 24-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive an in-game prod.
  • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
  • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless he/she posts before the moderator finds a replacement.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. At the time when you have read this post and are ready to play(aka c onfirming), post something random in bold that is not related to any other previous c onfirm. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, SE’s up to one, and IC’s none. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (GeneralCobra19) am the Moderator of Game 165. chess24 is the co-moderator of Game 165. (whoops i meant 169 but hey i get to take over 165 with lazy modding too ayyyyyyyyyyyy)
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for other moderator stuff.
  • Please do not post in those colors or in any shades of those colors.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules. The comod has second to last say, aka last say at that moment that they say, unless I have specified otherwise.


Setup
This game will use the Cop9'er setup. This is an open setup.

-1 Cop with random initial copcheck on a VT
-6 Vanilla Townies
-2 Mafia Goons

Role PM’s
Vanilla Townie Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a Vanilla Townie.

You have no night actions, but your power comes in your voice and your vote. Unless you suck at mafia, in which you may take the fifth amendment and ask for replacement. Actually please don't.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.

You can find the game thread here.
Cop Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!

You are a Cop.

Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to inspect. You will receive a result of innocent or guilty (town or mafia).

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You also know that ___ is town.
Mafia Goon Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!

You are Mafia Goon.

Your mafia partner(s) are <partner(s)>. You may discuss in this quicktopic at night only. You may also decide on who to kill, which one of you or the other goon(s) will perform.

You win when the mafia obtain the majority and nothing can prevent this from occurring. For example, if the majority of the mafia is dead, you win and nothing can prevent that from happening.


Alive
jeffisepic++


Dead
town and kevinmathz


Significant Events
scum won


No posting until this line is crossed out.
______________________________________________________

the line is crossed out.

jeffisepic wrote:
I'm basically claiming a cop with n0 on mathlegend

tldr of the article
Anyway, the point of n0 is for every town to do it, so that the cop can blend in with the townies and hide their identity.

The mafia then try to hunt for the cop (because they will need to do that ASAP). This way, even if the cop dies, all their peeks will be revealed and be confirmed townies.

The job as a VT is to keep good cover. This means you want to act like a cop in that you wouldn't want to attack your peeks. Here, peeks mean cop checks.
Leaving a correct n0 is also necessary, but you don't have to worry about that for now. Just pick someone and townread them for the whole game will suffice.
Don't slip cop or not-cop, don't claim cop unless you're about to die!!

Ask for any questions. Reading the article probably good

post_rendered:
^ that’s not the point, necessarily. Basically, the point is that everyone will claim cop and give an n0, including the real cop - then, if the real cop is killed at night, we know who their real investigations were and that creates either conftowns or confscums.

Jeff might not be confident that you’re town, but he doesn’t need to be.

However, if you’re VT, it’s a good idea to n0 someone who seems towny to you. Reason: if you accidentally n0 a mafia, they then know that you’re not the cop. This narrows down their hunt. (They are trying to kill the cop)

Let’s make sure everyone really understands this concept before we go around making n0s - otherwise we risk cop lying, cop slipping, people voting based on who does/doesn’t n0 them, etc.

However, if you’re VT, it’s a good idea to n0 someone who seems towny to you. Reason: if you accidentally n0 a mafia, they then know that you’re not the cop. This narrows down their hunt. (They are trying to kill the cop)

Let’s make sure everyone really understands this concept before we go around making n0s - otherwise we risk cop lying, cop slipping, people voting based on who does/doesn’t n0 them, etc.[/quote]

seer is another term for cop. in this setup the seer/cop in their start-of-game role pm is given a player who they know is town (called their n0, because it's sort of like a night 0 action)
so the cop is saying the person they were given as the n0, and all the other players are trying to confuse scum by giving fake n0 results to hide who the real cop is

post_rendered:
You can read the mafia FAQ section on it, or read this little explaination.

It stand for Wine In Front Of Me, and it references a movie called "The Princess Bride", specifically a scene where there are two characters, and each has a glass on wine. The challenge is thus: One of them has put poison in one glass, and the other has to choose which glass to drink from, as to not die. Here's the gist: "Should I pick the glass in front of me? But wait, maybe he put the poison in front of me thinking I would pick that cup...". It goes back and forth.

Edit By Way Of Post.

Let me get whatever is on my mind regards to this game straight: We have one clear: apw.

D1, wagons: hd, piggy. I pushed basically both of them. My reasoning for proposing a hd wagon was i) I thought kevin actually had decent cop equity by being so convinced on nerdy v and ii) information about a rising counterwagon is always good if one of the two are wolves. Kevin was settled on "my n0" which means that I had to get him off to continue cop cover. Piggy was still flinched.

D2: HD speedflinched, kevin claimed red on hd. The mechanical reason why hd must've been flinched: There was room for belief that kevin was cop,, and it CERTAINLY seemed likely considering how the last day with piggy went. I actually semi-copread kevin myself, however IF kevin was FPS (fancy play syndroming aka not cop claiming red) I wanted to make sure that town was not punished. Therefore, I asked him to claim his red peek, and nothing else. The reason I said "WAIT WAIT" was because I wanted time to recollect on the last time I encountered someone claiming a red in thread. And It has always been flinching the red check. Town's priority is to have the cop survive, and my action was the best to preserve that. The only reason goodbye, your logic is flawed, is because you are pinning the fact that cop died tonight on me, despite it clearly being inevitable.

Interactions- not much

This day- goodbye and mathlegend both start a tunnel on me.

There are a couple of scenarios:
i) kevin is NOT in fact mafia and just a FPSer (and kevin is a FPSer actually)
I'm disinclined to believe this, however at this point this means that the wolfteam is exaclty mathlegend/goodbye. And this is definitely not a possibility I want to overlook, and I probably want to discuss with APW some more. I just hate goodbye's insistence on me. The most primary example is how goodbye accuses me on being on v wagons both days, when mathlegend clearly is the same. That's not solving, that's an agenda.

ii) kevin is mafia- Then there is no doubt in my mind that mathlegend is his buddy. My concern with mathlegend is that his first post was a snapvote on kevin with ANY reconsideration and that highly screams preplanned bussing. Extremely high chance of being staged, like they planned that they need to bus to secure a win in F3. Yes, it's a perfectly normal and common strategy. Do NOT ever townread bussing in F5, it's totally doable and you will just lose a lot of games.

If it were up to me, I would flinch ML>kevin right now, and here's why:
i) I think that ML is wolf every single time in this F5
ii) We flinch kevin, and say game goes on. Then, goodbye chooses between {me,ML} in F3 which results in an instantaneous loss.
iii) We flinch ML, and game goes on. Then, I choose in {kevin,goodbye} and I'd like to say I'm competent to make the right decision. I'm not going to say which because that may just sway the nightkill.

APW, if you believe I'm town, then you should vote ML. If you think I'm mafia, well, don't. but like I trust you more than goodbye to make a correct decision, if you get what I mean. Geez, why is it always your read on me that counts every game LOL.
